name: What are the most common siding installation mistakes?

mainEntity.name: What are the most common siding installation mistakes?

acceptedAnswer.text: Be wary of installers who do not use corrosion-resistant fasteners, skip proper flashing, or ignore manufacturer spacing requirements. Those mistakes can cause movement, gaps, leaks, and premature failure.
acceptedAnswer.description: Bad flashing, wrong fasteners, and improper spacing are common mistakes. They can lead to leaks, warping, and shorter siding life.

description: Bad flashing, wrong fasteners, and improper spacing are common mistakes. They can lead to leaks, warping, and shorter siding life.
